reviews.review_description:
This app which I purchased used to work now after it loads in the office

 press explore and go outside it just keeps downloading arrows on the screen it fails to load anymore when it worked it was quite good now nothing only stuck in office
I would definitely pay for more locations. I never experienced any glitches when I played it.

I'm trying to use the national geographic explore vr app on my meta quest 2.  It loads up fine, but when it asks me to pick up the camera, it doesn't do anything after that.  I cant explore any further in the app, as I'm stuck with it telling me to pick up the camera

reviews.review_title: More an experience than a game
reviews.review_description:
My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
Same problem with program on loop when grabbing the camera. How about a refund or else get the darn program working!?

I thoroughly enjoyed this game. Camera occasionally glitchy, difficult climbing handling at certain points. But overall brilliant and awe inspiring. I didnt want it to end. I'd love to see additional expeditions added please!

reviews.review_title: What is it supposed to do?
reviews.review_description: Starts stays-stays stays
It was a really good game I got to the top of the iceberg and my thing was glitching her and I can barely walk around even in the home menu don't really prefer
The game was fun when it worked, but it glitched every so often, and that was annoying.
No foncciona corectamente !!!

reviews.review_title: Love this game, but it’s stuck
reviews.review_description:
This is a great game concept. And I love the levels that I did. However, I’m stuck with the penguins and can’t get out. The game is glitched. I uninstalled and reinstalled it, and it is still glitching in the same exact spot. Who do I contact to get this resolved? 

If it worked, my rating would be a five ￼￼

Good water in Antarctica. Translucent and teaming with fish. The ice is also impressively transparent. Replay comes from going back and trying for pictures you missed. Antarctica has a short easy climbing section or a longer, more challenging route. Those have a little The Climb vibe. Not really much replay in Machu Pichu. Short game. Clean visuals. Interesting and educational.

Love the kayak adventure! At least no motion sickness. Wished I could wander completely at my own pace but also nice to not have to paddle the whole time. Also didn’t care for all the fog to start, but glad it got clearer as you went along. Climbing the ice wall was fun as well. They really need to add a tropical kayak ride too! ;)
I like this game but it only has 2 modes please add more
The controls don’t make it easy to navigate

reviews.review_title: I am a photographer NG cover
reviews.review_description:
Ancient ruins and nature expressed delicately and magnificently. This is the story of the Earth. 

It was such a wonderful experience, especially the Antarctic expedition was an ecstatic experience. Please continue making this series. I want to keep purchasing such high quality works.
very cool..
It won't even let me start from where I'm sitting. Wants me to go stand in the middle of the dining room. And only two places to visit. No way to cancel purchase. Don't buy.

Abysmal instructions for using the app. I have not been able to move past the element of the app where it wants you to learn to use a camera and take pictures during the viewing experience. I cannot find any way how to exit the room in which I am situated when I launch the app. Instructions like “move to the marker when you’re ready to start exploring“ is nebulous. I have no idea what it means. I sent a note to the company asking for help 12 days ago and still haven’t received a response. Shameful. ￼

reviews.review_title: Was a 5 Star now only a  3 Star
reviews.review_description:
Was a 5 star experience through and through back when i got this app when i had quest 1 and have had the app since then and now to quest 3.
BUT, there have been absolutely NO updates to the app in all those years. I mean it's National Geographic... surely they can make more content for updates... very lazy.
I downgrade my star rating to 3
My son is a huge fan of this app and it's also good for homeschooling. Can you please update with more locations? ♥️

Last night, I spent three hours on a photo shoot for National Geographic magazine at Machu Picchu. At least, that's how it felt. It felt like I was there listening to the llamas walking around nearby.This was a great experience. I look forward to my next VR experience in Antarctica. I guess I'd better dress warm!

reviews.review_title: Obsessed! Can’t Wait for More Locations!
reviews.review_description: The best travel app I’ve ever used! It’s absolutely worth the price—like taking a real trip for a fraction of the cost. I had an amazing experience with my kids, and starting the game at the same time made it feel like we were exploring together. I do wish there was a feature that let us all explore as a group, but it’s still incredible how much it feels like you’re actually there. I’d love to see more locations added and would happily help spread the word about this app!

reviews.review_title: Never go this game to load
reviews.review_description: I tried several times, several different day, and the app never launches passed the yellow loading arrows on my Quest 3; so I have no idea what I’m missing.
Over all I liked the 2 worlds… but that was it.. only 2 worlds… I wish there was more! Anyone know if they will add updates?
It’s fun and all but 10 bucks for a game with 30 minutes of repetitive gameplay? Add more bro.
I loved it but needs more places to visit with more things to do. I loved the kayaking and climbing!!

reviews.review_title: Add more places to go to
reviews.review_description: It is sooo beautiful and I love it but I would say that you should only buy it if it is on sale because there is two places Machu pechu and antartaca

OK, I bought this for Machu Picchu having been fortunate enough to go there and wanted to reminisce. Unfortunately, even though the mapping out of the site is very good you can only go to two locations. I expected to be able to walk around but this was not to be.

However what saves this app is the Antarctic element. It's really enjoyable, from kayaking to climbing. It's worth getting just for this.
Wow I love the views wish I could see them in person, great first game for beginners to quest. Only downfall is only two areas to visit but its a great game hopefully they update with more areas
You only get 2 places to explore. Feels a bit like a rip off. Hopefully more will be added soon.

I thought this app would be my go-to app after work to go wander around the world on different missions, but no. Unfortunately it only focuses on Machu Pichu and Antartica. Too short. 

On the other hand, it is really an immersive experience. I loved it so much and that’s why it’s so disappointing bc you crave more. The graphics, the sound, everything is amazing. Not bad for $10. 

As Developer, i would keep updating it with more destinations and activities. Thanks!
￼ Do not buy. ￼

Can’t even get it to start. Stupid yellow arrows and nothing starts. Got it to start once then it sent me to the camera which didn’t work. I want a refund. 
Very disappointing.

This garbage software is still on the store, it’s insane. The internet is full of people saying it’s broken and it totally is. Just a screen of yellow arrows on launch. Sometimes, eventually, maybe, it loads. It’s a total crapshoot waiting 5+ minutes at a time to see if it works. Save your effort and money.

If you thought you could explore cool things and feel a tiny bit adventurous...you were probably dissatisfied too! This is somehow considered a game and you’re a photographer for nat geo...i couldn’t care any less about taking photos or pretending to be with nat geo, i just wanted to walk around. Worst purchase on the vr device so far.

2.5/5 
Unreal with photo textures is pretty good; moves and reacts pretty slick. I'll say it certainly works better on busy high contrast busy background stuff like Machu Picchu, as it does look a bit plastic and Skyrim-y on the white-on-white palette of Antarctica. 

Activities are varied and fun but it doesn't change the bottom line that two environments just do not cut it for a National Geographic product. This is what I would have expected for a free demo, not the paid product. 

Add a couple more environments(with less activities if you must) and then we'll talk.
Antarctica won't load. It only shows arrows streaming when I get to that particular video.
My mom has always wanted to go to Machu Pichuu and she was able to virtually with this app 🙏🏼❤️☀️🦅🌌!!!…
I don’t care about learning to take pictures in your subpar landscape I really just want to look around but somehow you’ve managed to complicate that
Any VR app that I have to exit twice from because you get stuck with no obvious path to resolve is junk. I can see why they abandoned it. Did no one test this app?
Not a fan I find it boring

reviews.review_title: I am new, but I found this uninspiring.
reviews.review_description: There could be so much more to this. Place to medite, historical facts, some mini games. I found picture taking difficult to navigate. I am somewhat limited with movement options. Perhaps fun for younger audiences, but for adults I think it is lame. I will try kayaks, but thinking to make return.

This virtual experience (it is not a game) is waaaaay better than I expected.

The environments look surreal and you have two distinct options on movement.

However, the photo realism gives me jelly legs...but I am new to VR.

My expectations for the graphics in this one were too high. I'm sure the graphics are OK considering the current state of the art for VR, but it was disappointing to see the lackluster quality of the imagery used under the name of a magazine known for the quality of its photos. The voice acting in the Machu Picchu section would be funny if it weren't so annoying and clumsily done. In this section, you find that you have no choice but to accept a photography assignment from the magazine. The experience, in which the female voice actor with a timbre somewhere between a small bird and a screeching violin, chirps orders at you to take photos (you are allowed to go through a few steps to avoid having to take photos, but are required to do that multiple times) felt like being ordered around during an experience that would have been more enjoyable if there were an option to forego the make-work assignments. I guess it might be fun for kids who enjoy pretending they are at work, but I found it to be an annoying experience that felt more like a job than a relaxing exploration.
2 options are a Bruh moment
Keeps asking me to pick up the camera even after I did pick up camera. Over and over. Very irritating. Never saw anything else.  Uck

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Sorry to hear you are having issues with the experience.  Please email us at support@forcefieldxr.com and we can help you get started.

reviews.review_description: This only served to irritate me and give me a headache. How do I get a refund?

developer_response.body:
Hello Somegirl22,
Were you having technical issues?  If so, please email support@forcefieldxr.com and we can help.

reviews.review_description: Only two small mission, 1 hour... 👎I am des appointed

I just finished the Antarctica expedition and based on that alone, I would highly recommend this experience. 

PROS: The kayaking portion feels very realistic and the climbing experience was exhilarating and had my fingers sweating. Graphics are great and I like the option to experience each segment independently instead of having to redo the entire journey altogether. It's a great "game" to show to your friends the potential and realism of VR. 

CONS: Please have more destinations! Also, I wish I could have more time in the tent to explore or have different camping activities. 

Each expedition should take ~1hr. It's decently replayable for people like me who enjoy nature and want to escape outdoors, and worth the ~10$ (or less if you got it on sale like me!)

Ratted a three for view only. The game has an interesting premise, putting the player as a photographer for national geographic. The game takes you on a tour of two locations. The downside is that the game only allows you to explore the location through  4 or 5 small barriered regions. They will guide you through the area asking you to take photos along the way and give you information on the location but really I personally wanted to walk around and see more. You can't go past the barriers and there are only two locations. Also there are lamas you can't pet the lamas

This experience mixes game like coordination with some basic generic education.  Would have been 5 stars if the education points would be expanded, it is national geographic.  The motion was relatively smooth and graphics were splendid.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. Have you explored the latest location of Machu Picchu? We have really expanded the educational content quite a bit for this experience. Check it out.

reviews.review_description: Great game and is very enjoyable but you are left with the taste for more.    It so short.   Why can’t we have more places.   I would happily pay for more dlc just go get more places

Pretty cool… would like it to have been longer tho…
Hopefully there will be lots more….
This app is great, but needs far more than two destinations to explore. Hopefully more will be released/added? Only then can you really “explore” the globe.

Great work Nat Geo, Oculus Studios, and ForceField! Way to take the lead on non-gaming amazing experiences that simulate reality and experiences that many don't have a chance to experience in real life. It's exactly the kind of experience that will take VR beyond just gaming and into every household. We need many more just like it. Please continue producing and bring to the world more explorations like this! Looking forward to updates!

developer_response.body: Hello Sara-Calliope-Have you tried the free update with Machu Picchu?  There is a whole new experience waiting to be explored!  Check it out.

reviews.review_description:
It can drop you outside the lodge without any instructions on how to get back in the lodge or how to actually start the program

Use the left joystick put the yellow circle on the yellow stake once you take a picture it will let you pick a destination 

The yellow arrows are trying to guide you to go to the yellow stake

reviews.review_title: Great. but Please add more places!
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun I loved climbing a mountain and taking pictures but please add more! And I also saw that for some reason I couldn’t climb in certain places in the mountain. My ice pick goes through those parts. This is a great game and all but please add more destinations and fix that bug.

As others noted, this is a great toe in the water.  But one mission is pretty short lived. It’s nice to have on the library for people to get exposed to what is possible without being into gaming. More content would be huge.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review.  Have you heard there is more content coming to the experience? We are adding a whole new location for you to explore. It will be a free update to your existing app. Check it out here:
http://ocul.us/MachuPicchu

reviews.review_description: Great experience, great everything! From kayaking to climbing, this one will ensure you continue loving the VR experience. I wish they would expand it and add other locations or come out with a second version. All in all, totally worth the $9.99.
